NAVAREA XIX 30/19 
NORWEGIAN SEA
1. NAVAL ROCKET TEST FIRING 11 TO 14 APR 0300 TO 1900 UTC
IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A.    69-30.0N 008-50.0E
B.    70-19.0N 008-50.0E 
C.    70-19.0N 010-50.0E 
D.    69-30.0N 010-15.0E



2. AREA IS DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION3. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 142000 UTC APR 19
